ddls:
CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the location is situated */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the location is situated */,
  "zip" TEXT /* Zip code of the location */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the location was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the location */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Geographical latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Geographical longitude of the location */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the location */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "providers" (
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each provider */,
  "provider_name" TEXT /* Name of the provider */,
  "email" TEXT /* Contact email of the provider */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the provider */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the provider */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the provider was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the provider */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the provider */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the provider is situated */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the provider is situated */,
  "zip" TEXT /* Zip code of the provider */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the provider */,
  "services_offered" TEXT /* List of services offered by the provider */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "service_areas" (
  "service_area_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each service area */,
  "service_id" INTEGER /* ID of the service that serves this area */,
  "area_name" TEXT /* Name of the area */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the area is situated */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the area is situated */,
  "zip" TEXT /* Zip code of the area */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the service area was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the service area */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Geographical latitude of the area */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Geographical longitude of the area */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("service_area_id")
)
